# Form 137 — Junior High School Permanent Record

Source: **F137-TEMPLATE-FORM-JHS.pdf** (NPS official). Grade 7–10.

## Header (learner identity)
- Name
- Date of Birth · Gender
- Place of Birth · Nationality
- Father's Name · Occupation
- Mother's Name · Occupation
- Address
- Elementary Course Completed · School Year
- **LRN** · General Average (of elementary)

Promotion summary lines (with General Average each):
Promoted to Grade VIII · Grade IX · Grade X · Grade XI.

## Per-grade subject grids (Grade 7 → Grade 10)
Four grade blocks, each headed:
- `Grade N/Section:` · `School: Naga Parochial School` · `School Year:`

Each block:

| SUBJECTS | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | Final |
|----------|---|---|---|---|-------|

(Quarters 1–4 + Final. Grade 7 sample shows `Passed` in the first Final cell.) Below
each block: `Promoted to: Grade N+1` · `General Average:`.

## Attendance Report (Grade 4-6 label; rows 7,8,9,10 for JHS)
Table: `School Year` · `GRADE LEVEL` (7/8/9/10) · `NUMBER OF SCHOOL DAYS` ·
`NUMBER OF DAYS PRESENT`.

## Certification
> I CERTIFY that this is a true record of __________. This pupil is eligible for
> admission to **Grade XI**. Copy of this record is sent to the principal of __________
> on __________.

Signatory: **MARITES C. RAMOS, Registrar**.

> Note: SF10/Form 137 quarters are 1–4 on the permanent record. The live grading uses
> `periodsForSy` (SY 2026+ = 3 terms q1–q3; earlier = 4 quarters). Reconcile term→column
> mapping when generating this form.
